work_package_result.summary: Established one pinned Fast Gate for every pull request and main push, added structural CI and clean-worktree verification, and enforced the up-to-date check on protected main without administrator bypass.

passed: exact local sequence: just bootstrap, clean-worktree probe, just check, clean-worktree probe
45 developer-tool unit tests including 12 focused CI contract tests
Rust format, clippy, workspace and documentation tests
desktop, mobile and Node adapter-host TypeScript checks
protocol generation and compatibility checks against origin/main
final PR Fast Gate run 29574203477 and Protocol Compatibility run 29574203649
main Fast Gate run 29574381298 and Protocol Compatibility run 29574381302
saved GitHub branch protection rule 80381387 reopened and verified
not_run: nightly matrices, release signing and native packaging are package non-goals

review.method: R2 detached review of the exact implementation diff with focused closure passes and saved GitHub branch-protection evidence
findings_closed: Applied and reopened the main branch-protection rule instead of relying on checked-in desired state alone
Removed administrator bypass by enforcing the rule for administrators
Confirmed generated catalogue and repository metadata are committed and clean under generation checks
Replaced the pre-check tracked-only diff with tracked-and-untracked clean probes before and after verification
Replaced string matching with structural YAML, Justfile and bootstrap validation plus adversarial tests
Fast Gate run 29573837713 exposed Windows CRLF navigation checksums; generation now pins LF and a regression test guards it

observability_changes: GitHub exposes one stable required Fast Gate result
clean-worktree failures list every tracked or untracked drift entry
CI contract failures identify the workflow, recipe, bootstrap or protection mismatch
known_limitations: Classic GitHub branch protection is external state and should be audited periodically against the checked-in contract
The fast gate intentionally excludes nightly matrices, release signing and native application packaging
No provider credentials or production provider adapters are exercised in M00
